title: Everbuild Replacement Cartridge Nozzles – Suitable For Standard Cartridges – White – Pack Of 6
features: UNIVERSAL DESIGN – Works with most standard-size cartridges when the previous cartridge nozzle is worn or needs replacing.
HANDY PACK – There are six sealant cartridge nozzles in each pack, so you shouldn't run out in the short term.
FITS STANDARD CARTRIDGES – They're best used on 290ml and 310ml sealant or adhesive cartridges.
CAPS NOT INCLUDED – Each nozzle is designed as a like-for-like replacement sealant nozzle tip, so any existing nozzle caps should fit well.
INCLUDES FITTING HOOPS – Comes with the fitting hoop attached to hook over the cartridge opening safely.
description: From the manufacturer About us We are passionate about the products we produce, we have always worked on the simple premise that Trade Users will only come back for good products, so that’s all we make! This simple philosophy combined with a commitment to invest in new product development and manufacturing infrastructure has seen Everbuild - A Sika Company grow into the UK’s sealant, adhesive and building chemical brand. Everbuild - A Sika Company are owned by Sika AG, a globally active speciality chemicals company offering a comprehensive range of products, including waterproofing systems, sealing, bonding and speciality mortars etc, across many construction and associated sectors. WORLD CLASS MANUFACTURING Over 80% of our range is manufactured in our own factory with large scale manufacturing capacity across all our core product areas, we can produce in excess of 55 million cartridges a year and with our new polymer plant we even make our own PVA, Wood Adhesive and Acrylic Polymers. Our manufacturing plant gives Everbuild - A Sika Company the ability to compete on a global scale, and our customers the peace of mind that they are dealing with a manufacturer with in-depth technical ability
